_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: After importing 3,721 RefSeq IDs corresponding to proteins cataloged in the Secreted Protein Database, we focused on 1,664 transcripts...132 were similarly upregulated in both neurofibroma-derived Schwann cell cultures and primary tumors and secreted
details: Successfully cataloged 3,721 RefSeq IDs corresponding to secreted proteins and enabled identification of 132 upregulated transcripts that encode secreted proteins
